acceptedAnswer.text: Prioritize Gemini, Perplexity, ChatGPT for Chicago med mal; optimize with IL case citations and schema for 115% visibility lift per KDD 2024 research.

suggestedAnswer.text: Chicago firms: Gemini for local search integration, Perplexity for legal queries. Track via multi-platform dashboards. Content tip: Include verdict databases for authority.
